seed_instruction: Send an email to a software developer asking for a product demo.
org_constraint: Specify a preferred time frame for the demo.
new_constraint: Avoid specifying a time frame for the demo.
instruction: Send an email to a software developer asking for a product demo. Specify a preferred time frame for the demo. Avoid specifying a time frame for the demo.
response:
Subject: Request for Product Demo – [Your Company Name]

Dear [Developer's Name],

I hope this email finds you well.

I have been following your work on [Product Name] and am very impressed by the innovative approach you are taking to solve [specific problem or industry challenge]. We are currently evaluating solutions in this space and would love to schedule a product demonstration to see how your platform could benefit our team.

Could you please let us know your general availability for a demo in the coming weeks? We are flexible and happy to work around your schedule.

Please feel free to suggest a few time slots that work best for you, and we will do our best to accommodate.

Thank you for your time, and I look forward to hearing from you.

Best regards,

[Your Name]  
[Your Job Title]  
[Your Company Name]  
[Your Contact Information]
